languages.text: "Рано вы начали отдавать приказы. Мы еще не окончили Тренировочный Бой". {n}Тихий голос Батошски с легкостью перекрывает шум толпы.{/n}
"It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Рано вы начали отдавать приказы. Мы еще не окончили Тренировочный Бой". {n}Тихий голос Батошски с легкостью перекрывает шум толпы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "You've started giving orders too soon. We haven't finished the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}
"You've started giving orders too soon. We haven't finished the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

"It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

languages.text: “现在发号施令还太早。试炼比武还没开始呢。”{n}巴托什斯基平静的声音，轻易压过了人群的嘈杂。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “现在发号施令还太早。试炼比武还没开始呢。”{n}巴托什斯基平静的声音，轻易压过了人群的嘈杂。{/n}

languages.text: "Emirler yağdırmaya başlamak için biraz erken değil mi? Henüz Sınav Karşılaşması'nı yapmadık." {n}Batoshski'nin suskun sesi, kalabalığın gürültüsünü kolayca yarıp geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Emirler yağdırmaya başlamak için biraz erken değil mi? Henüz Sınav Karşılaşması'nı yapmadık." {n}Batoshski'nin suskun sesi, kalabalığın gürültüsünü kolayca yarıp geçiyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous allez un peu trop vite en besogne. L'Épreuve par les armes vous attend d'abord. » {n}La voix placide de Batoshski couvre aisément les bruits de foule.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous allez un peu trop vite en besogne. L'Épreuve par les armes vous attend d'abord. » {n}La voix placide de Batoshski couvre aisément les bruits de foule.{/n}

languages.text: «Aún es un poco pronto para que empiece a dar órdenes. Aún no hemos celebrado la prueba de combate». {n}La voz queda de Batoshski atraviesa el ruido de la multitud.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Aún es un poco pronto para que empiece a dar órdenes. Aún no hemos celebrado la prueba de combate». {n}La voz queda de Batoshski atraviesa el ruido de la multitud.{/n}

languages.text: "Es ist etwas früh, Befehle zu erteilen. Ihr habt den Prüfungskampf noch nicht absolviert." {n}Batoshskis ruhige Stimme durchschneidet mühelos das Lärmen der Menge.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's a bit early for you to start giving orders. We haven't had the Trial Match yet." {n}Batoshski's quiet voice easily cuts through the noise of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Es ist etwas früh, Befehle zu erteilen. Ihr habt den Prüfungskampf noch nicht absolviert." {n}Batoshskis ruhige Stimme durchschneidet mühelos das Lärmen der Menge.{/n}

languages.text: 「まだトライマッチも終わってないのに、君が命令を下すのはちょっと早すぎるよ。 」{n}バトシュスキーの静かな声は、騒々しい観客のざわめきを容易に切り裂く。{/n}
